title: alkekengi fissum
intro: Alkekengi fissum, also known as the Chinese lantern plant, is a type of flowering plant in the nightshade family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Alkekengi fissum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and calming the digestive system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, but more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
